ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code (e.g., sh600036) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry sector */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Finance, Technology) */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the company (e.g., Banking, Software) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of the market (e.g., stock, futures, options) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "PE_TTM" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio (Trailing Twelve Months) */,
  "PS_TTM" REAL /* Price-to-Sales ratio (Trailing Twelve Months) */,
  "PC_TTM" REAL /* Price-to-Cash Flow ratio (Trailing Twelve Months) */,
  "PB" REAL /* Price-to-Book ratio */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin (percentage) */,
  "EBITDA" TEXT /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization (EBITDA) */,
  "operating_cash_flow" TEXT /* Operating cash flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was removed from the watchlist (null if still in watchlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered (null if not yet triggered) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the stock (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Optional comment accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (null if top-level comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_comments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or model that made the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the adjustment was made */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of the adjustment (e.g., split, dividend) */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Optional description of the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_adjustments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield (percentage) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payment (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the split is made */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date when the split is made */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the split (e.g., 2-for-1) */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of the split (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the index is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the index */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the index */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was removed from the index (null if still in index) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_composition_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_composition_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
